description: You are a student library assistant at an OLPC-equipped school. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/build_catalog.py that dynamically scans /home/ga/Documents/library/ for .epub files and extracts their metadata. The script must treat each EPUB as a ZIP archive using the built-in zipfile module (without external libraries) to locate the .opf metadata file and extract the text from the <dc:title> and <dc:creator> tags. Output the file name, title, and author for each book to /home/ga/Documents/library_catalog.txt and execute the script to generate the catalog.
